summary: Iteration 18 testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: CTA→Chat redirect working (Hero, Nav, Contact, Integrations CTAs all open Chat modal), WhatsApp button on left side with correct href (wa.me/31613318856), Admin CRM expansion (Chats + Timeline tabs working), Customer Portal shows error without token. Email template contains Pascal Courbois signature with company links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified all new features: (1) CTA→Chat redirect - Hero, Nav, Contact, Integrations CTAs all open Chat modal with 'Angebot anfordern' as primary and 'Termin buchen' as secondary, (2) Customer Memory API at GET /api/admin/customer-memory/{email} returns full customer context, (3) Admin CRM has Chats tab (forum icon) showing 30 sessions with message counts and Timeline tab (timeline icon) showing 50 audit events, (4) Customer Portal at /portal shows 'Zugang nicht möglich' error without token, (5) Lead notes API POST /api/admin/leads/{lead_id}/notes works, (6) WhatsApp button on left side with green styling and correct href wa.me/31613318856, (7) Admin topbar has clean header hierarchy with no overlap, (8) All existing APIs still work (health, tariffs, descriptions, faq, booking slots, PDF), (9) Email template includes Pascal Courbois signature with Impressum/Datenschutz/AGB links.

cta_chat_redirect.details: Hero CTA 'Beratung starten' opens Chat modal, Nav CTA opens Chat, Contact CTA opens Chat, Integrations CTA opens Chat. Chat sidebar shows 'Angebot anfordern' as primary and 'Termin buchen' as secondary.

customer_memory_api.details: GET /api/admin/customer-memory/{email} returns email, memory_context, lead, quotes, invoices, bookings, chat_sessions

admin_chats_tab.details: Chats tab in sidebar with forum icon, loads list of 30 sessions with session_id, customer_email, message_count, last_message, created_at

admin_timeline_tab.details: Timeline tab in sidebar with timeline icon, shows 50 audit events with type, event, ref_id, actor, timestamp

admin_lead_notes.details: POST /api/admin/leads/{lead_id}/notes adds note with text, author, date

customer_portal.details: /portal page loads, shows 'Zugang nicht möglich - Kein Zugangstoken vorhanden' error without token, API returns 403 for invalid token

whatsapp_button.details: WhatsApp button visible on left side (x=0), green styling, href=https://wa.me/31613318856, text='WhatsApp'

admin_topbar.details: Admin topbar has clean header/button hierarchy with no overlap between title and user elements

existing_apis.details: GET /api/health, GET /api/product/tariffs, GET /api/product/descriptions, GET /api/product/faq, GET /api/booking/slots, GET /api/product/tariff-sheet all working

email_template_signature.details: Email template includes Pascal Courbois, Geschäftsführer, Tel +31 6 133 188 56, nexifyai@nexifyai.de, nexify-automate.com, Impressum/Datenschutz/AGB links

mocked_apis.email_sending: Resend API key is placeholder - emails not actually sent
mocked_apis.revolut_payments: Revolut API keys are placeholder - payments not processed
